message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

class Composite <<C>> {
  +add(component:Component):void
  +remove(component:Component):void
  +getChild():int
  +operation():void
}

abstract class Component <<A>> {
  +add(component:Component):void
  +remove(component:Component):void
  +getChild():int
  +operation():void
}

class Leaf <<C>> {
  +operation():void
}

class Client <<C>>

abstract class OrganizationComponent <<A>> {
  +add(component:OrganizationComponent):void
  +print():void
}

class University <<C>>
class College <<C>>
class Department <<C>>

note left of Composite
组合可以操作叶子节点或者叶子节点，但可能不具有叶子节点的某些行为
end note

note left of Leaf
叶子节点，不能操作子节点
end note

note left of Component
Component 为所有节点的基类，不管是普通节点还是叶子节点
end note

Composite --|> Component
Leaf --|> Component

Composite o-- Component

University --|> OrganizationComponent
College --|> OrganizationComponent
Department --|> OrganizationComponent

College o-- OrganizationComponent

Client ..> OrganizationComponent
@enduml
